join_order.notes: Empirical sampling over 2000000 USD rows showed starting with sub is required; adsh_to_rowid gives the cheapest and most selective first test.

join_order.build: pre(indexed by adsh_tag_version_sorted, filtered at probe time to stmt = 'EQ')
join_order.notes: Use the existing sorted pre rowid index to binary-search (adsh,tag,version), scan the contiguous run, and count only stmt=eq_code matches; do not build a runtime pre hash table.
Sampling showed sub->pre->tag is the fastest order because the pre probe cuts candidates to roughly 20 percent of sub survivors before paying the tag hash probe.

data_structures.dim_filter: direct_array(sub/indexes/adsh_to_rowid.bin) with row-level reads of sub.sic and sub.cik
data_structures.fact_join: pre/indexes/adsh_tag_version.rowids.bin for binary-search + contiguous-run stmt counting, plus pre-built tag_version_hash for (tag,version) lookup
data_structures.aggregation: thread-local compact_hash_map keyed by (sic,tlabel,stmt_code) with values {sum_value,row_count} plus thread-local distinct_pair_set(group_key,cik)

indexes.purpose: skip num blocks whose uom range cannot contain usd_code
direct adsh lookup before sic and cik reads
binary-search (adsh,tag,version) and scan only the matching contiguous rowid run instead of building a runtime pre hash table
lookup tag rowid and tlabel after sub and pre have already filtered the probe stream

optimization_notes: Root cause: the prior plan was logically wrong for this hardware because it ignored the existing pre sorted index and spent 182.61ms building a large runtime pre hash table, including 64 thread-local hash maps whose combined working set pushes into LLC pressure for work that can be eliminated entirely. Strategy category A: restructure the plan to use the empirically best sampled join order sub->pre->tag, keep the cheap selective sub direct-array lookup first, use index nested-loop probes into pre/indexes/adsh_tag_version.rowids.bin to test stmt='EQ' without any pre build phase, and defer the tag hash probe until after the pre filter has reduced candidates.
